name: verify-chain
description: 3-role article fact-checking pipeline (Critic extracts claims, parallel Verifier subagents verify with web search, Repairer fixes errors). Writes .verification/article-verified.md + .verification/verification-report.md.

positive_triggers.input: I just finished writing a K8s upgrade guide, please verify accuracy
positive_triggers.reason: User finished writing IT article + asks for verification

positive_triggers.input: /verify-chain this article about Spring Boot 4 new features
positive_triggers.reason: Explicit slash-command trigger with article context

positive_triggers.input: 帮我核查一下这篇文章有没有错误，关于 Docker 网络模式
positive_triggers.reason: Chinese '核查' trigger + IT article domain

negative_triggers.input: My Python code has a bug, help me debug
Help me write a K8s tutorial from scratch
negative_triggers.reason: Writing new article, route to brainstorming → spec-driven-development

negative_triggers.input: What's the difference between REST and GraphQL?
negative_triggers.reason: General Q&A, not an article to fact-check

behavioral_evals.scenario: User provides a finished IT article (e.g., K8s HPA configuration guide) and asks to verify
expected_behavior: Agent invokes Critic system prompt from prompts/critic.md first, extracts ≥5 claims (Fact/Version/CommandConfig/BestPractice/Claim/Gap)
Agent launches N parallel OMO general subagents, each carrying verifier.md + ONE single claim
Verifier subagents DO NOT receive Critic's full output, article body, or other claims (context isolation hard constraint)
Each Verifier uses WebSearch + WebFetch to consult authoritative sources (official docs, GitHub source, MDN/ArchWiki/RFC), avoiding CSDN/juejin/personal blogs
Verifier subagent output: ✅/⚠️/❌/❓ per claim + URL sources + fix suggestions
Repairer (prompts/repairer.md) receives only ⚠️/❌/❓ results (NEVER ✅), applies minimal-change fixes per strategy table
If user said '先审再改' or '只查不改', agent pauses/skips Repairer per mode

notes: Behavioral evals are warning-level until promoted via upstream issue tracker. The three-role pipeline + context isolation + authoritative-source-only are the load-bearing constraints — verify-chain is useless without them.
